channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-4709] Can't allocate super-sequence, rc -115
item.description:
In setting up a Lustre 2.5.0 environment I am encountering an error.

<normal lustre mount messages>
 23:35:56 lotus-24 kernel: LDISKFS-fs (sdk8): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts:
Mar  3 23:35:56 lotus-24 kernel: LDISKFS-fs (sdk8): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts:
Mar  3 23:35:57 lotus-24 kernel: LDISKFS-fs (sdk8): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts:
Mar  3 23:42:18 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 17341:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) srv-testfs-OST000f: Can't allocate super-sequence, rc -115
Mar  3 23:42:18 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 17341:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) Skipped 1392 previous similar messages
Mar  3 23:52:18 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 15693:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) srv-testfs-OST0002: Can't allocate super-sequence, rc -115
Mar  3 23:52:18 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 15693:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) Skipped 1477 previous similar messages
Mar  4 00:02:18 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 17341:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) srv-testfs-OST001b: Can't allocate super-sequence, rc -115
Mar  4 00:02:18 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 17341:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) Skipped 1466 previous similar messages
Mar  4 00:12:19 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 15693:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) srv-testfs-OST0009: Can't allocate super-sequence, rc -115
Mar  4 00:12:19 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 15693:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) Skipped 1477 previous similar messages
Mar  4 00:22:20 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 17341:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) srv-testfs-OST0018: Can't allocate super-sequence, rc -115


.....
08:52:34 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 17341:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) srv-testfs-OST0004: Can't allocate super-sequence, rc -115
Mar  4 08:52:34 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 17341:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) Skipped 1474 previous similar messages
Mar  4 09:02:34 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 22775:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) srv-testfs-OST000f: Can't allocate super-sequence, rc -115
Mar  4 09:02:34 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 22775:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) Skipped 1470 previous similar messages
Mar  4 09:12:34 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 17341:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) srv-testfs-OST0002: Can't allocate super-sequence, rc -115
Mar  4 09:12:34 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 17341:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) Skipped 1477 previous similar messages
Mar  4 09:22:34 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 15693:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) srv-testfs-OST001b: Can't allocate super-sequence, rc -115
Mar  4 09:22:34 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 15693:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) Skipped 1466 previous similar messages
Mar  4 09:32:35 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 20339:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) srv-testfs-OST0009: Can't allocate super-sequence, rc -115
Mar  4 09:32:35 lotus-24 kernel: LustreError: 20339:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) Skipped 1477 previous similar messages

df shows all the OSTs mounted and present but trying to mount the namespace on a Client seems to reboot the systems.

As present there are 27 or so OSTs and a MDT on this server, this same behavior is seen on pure OSSs. The Lustre targets are physically slow.
item.environment: Lustre 2.5.0 Development environment, system is fresh and /scratch

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Something less then a client crash would be nice but it was user error.
Well it seems this is what happens when you create a -mdt -mgt with index=1 instead of index=0 (when you only have a single MDT). User error off-by-one.

It can also been seen in mount blocks like:

LDISKFS-fs (sdk3): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts: 
LDISKFS-fs (sdk3): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts: 
LDISKFS-fs (sdk3): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts: 
Lustre: testfs-OST0011: new disk, initializing
Lustre: Skipped 8 previous similar messages
LustreError: 13a-8: Failed to get MGS log params and no local copy.
LustreError: Skipped 17 previous similar messages
LustreError: 44563:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) srv-testfs-OST0001: Can't allocate super-sequence, rc -115
LustreError: 44563:0:(fid_handler.c:286:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) Skipped 340 previous similar messages
LDISKFS-fs (sdk5): mounted
